column1: #mapping_set_description: Manually curated SSSOM mappings between FINOS CDM party/identity classes and ISO/IEC 29100 Privacy Framework roles (lmodel/iso29100).

column9: CDM Party is broader than an ISO 29100 PrivacyStakeholder
A natural person whose PII is processed
A legal entity may act as PIIController for processing
A legal entity may act as PIIProcessor on behalf of a controller
A related party may be an ISO 29100 ThirdParty in PII flows
A trading counterparty is a ThirdParty in privacy terms
Person identifiers may constitute PII under ISO 29100
Contact details for a natural person are PII
Roles a natural person plays vs. PII processing
